message:
fix(workflow-runner): clean up state on plan validation failure and fix step timing

When an action plan failed validation, the workflow record was left in an
incomplete state and the pane lock was never released, blocking all
future workflows on that pane. Step timing logs also recorded near-zero
durations because the start timestamp was captured after execution.

Plan validation cleanup:
- On validation failure, call fail_execution() to mark the workflow
  record as failed with completed_at set
- Mark the trigger event as handled with "error" outcome
- Release the pane lock so subsequent workflows can proceed
- Add InvalidPlanWorkflow test workflow and test verifying that
  validation failure cleans up the record, releases the lock, and
  does not leave an incomplete workflow behind

Step timing fix:
- Move step_started_at = now_ms() before step execution (was after the
  await, making duration always ~0ms)
- Add SlowStepWorkflow test workflow with a 35ms sleep
- Test verifies duration_ms >= 25 and timestamp span reflects actual
  execution time

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
